title: CI QA gate: FontBakery + HarfBuzz shaping diff + coverage report
context: open-accessible-fonts requires automated quality gates so every font PR is verified before merge. The M0 foundation is not complete until FontBakery, HarfBuzz shaping diffs, and language-coverage reports run automatically on every PR. Depends on the build pipeline from fonts-infra-001 being in place.
objective: Add GitHub Actions CI that runs FontBakery (Universal + Google Fonts profiles), a HarfBuzz shaping diff against a test-string set, and a Unicode/language-coverage report (gflanguages/Hyperglot) on every pull request, failing the build on any FontBakery FAIL and surfacing WARNs for triage.
acceptanceCriteria: On every PR, CI runs FontBakery with Universal and GF profiles; the build fails on any FAIL result; WARNs are reported as artifacts for triage.
HarfBuzz shaping diff (diffenator2 or fontproof) runs against a documented test-string set and reports diffs as downloadable CI artifacts.
A Unicode + language-coverage report (gflanguages/Hyperglot) is generated and attached to each CI run.
CI configuration is checked into the repository with pinned tool versions; no proprietary tools or external services beyond GitHub Actions are required.
No secrets, tokens, or API keys are written to CI logs or artifacts.
output: A pull request adding a GitHub Actions workflow that runs FontBakery, HarfBuzz shaping diffs, and language-coverage reporting on every PR, with results surfaced as CI artifacts and build-blocking on FAIL.
